data.biography: Poorna Jagannathan è un'attrice e produttrice americana. È meglio conosciuta per la sua interpretazione di Safar Khan nello spettacolo della HBO nominato agli Emmy e ai Golden Globe, The Night Of, oltre a recitare nel film commedia cult di Bollywood Delhi Belly. Ha anche avviato e prodotto la commedia Nirbhaya, scritta e diretta da Yael Farber, che trattava di rompere il silenzio sulla violenza sessuale. La sua opera ha vinto l'Amnesty International Award nel 2013 ed è stata definita da The Telegraph "Uno dei pezzi teatrali più potenti che tu abbia mai visto". Jagannathan è stata inserita tra le prime 10 nelle "50 donne più belle dell'India" della rivista Femina nel 2012 e nel 2014 è stata nominata tra le prime 50 donne più potenti in India. Di recente è stata una serie regolare su Gypsy, una serie originale di Netflix, e parte del cast dell'ensemble per la nuova serie antologica della HBO, Room 104, dei fratelli Duplass. Il suo nuovo film, Share, diretto da Pippa Bianco e prodotto da A24, uscirà nel 2019 su HBO. Nel maggio 2018, Deadline ha annunciato che Jagannathan si sarebbe unito al cast della serie HBO Big Little Lies, come nuovo personaggio ricorrente.

data.name: プールナ・ジャガナサン

data.biography: Poorna Jagannathan jest amerykańską aktorką i producentką. Najbardziej znana jest z roli Safar Khana w nominowanym do nagrody Emmy i Złotego Globu serialu HBO The Night Of, a także z głównej roli w kultowej komedii Bollywood Delhi Belly. Zainicjowała i wyprodukowała również sztukę Nirbhaya, napisaną i wyreżyserowaną przez Yael Farber, która poruszała kwestię przełamania milczenia na temat przemocy seksualnej. Jej sztuka zdobyła nagrodę Amnesty International Award w 2013 r. i została nazwana przez The Telegraph „jednym z najpotężniejszych dzieł teatralnych, jakie kiedykolwiek zobaczysz”. Jagannathan znalazła się w pierwszej dziesiątce rankingu magazynu Femina „50 najpiękniejszych kobiet w Indiach” w 2012 r., a w 2014 r. znalazła się w gronie 50 najpotężniejszych kobiet w Indiach. Ostatnio była stałą członkinią obsady serialu Gypsy, oryginalnego serialu Netflixa, i częścią obsady nowego serialu antologicznego HBO, Room 104, braci Duplass. Jej nowy film, Share, wyreżyserowany przez Pippę Bianco i wyprodukowany przez A24, ma zostać wydany w 2019 roku na HBO. W maju 2018 roku Deadline ogłosił, że Jagannathan dołączy do obsady serialu HBO Big Little Lies jako nowa powracająca postać.

Poorna Jagannathan 是一位美国女演员和制片人。她最出名的是她在 HBO 的艾美奖和金球奖提名节目《The Night Of》中饰演 Safar Khan，以及在宝莱坞邪典喜剧电影 Delhi Belly 中扮演主角。她还发起并制作了由 Yael Farber 编剧和导演的戏剧 Nirbhaya，该剧旨在打破对性暴力的沉默。她的戏剧获得了 2013 年“国际特赦奖”，并被《每日电讯报》称为“你所见过的最有影响力的戏剧作品之一”。Jagannathan 在 10 年被 Femina 杂志评为“印度最美丽的 50 位女性”前 2012 名，2014 年，她被评为印度最有权势的 50 名女性之一。她最近是 Netflix 原创剧集《吉普赛人》的常客，也是 HBO 新选集剧集《104 号房间》的演员之一，该剧由 Duplass 兄弟执导。她的新片《Share》由 Pippa Bianco 执导，A24 制作，计划于 2019 年在 HBO 上映。2018 年 5 月，Deadline 宣布 Jagannathan 将加入 HBO 剧集《大小谎言》的演员阵容，作为一个新的反复出现的角色。
data.name: 普娜·贾甘纳坦

data.biography: 普爾娜·雅格娜森 是一位美國女演員和製片人。她最出名的是她在 HBO 的艾美獎和金球獎提名節目《The Night Of》中飾演 Safar Khan，以及在寶萊塢邪典喜劇電影 Delhi Belly 中扮演主角。她還發起並製作了由 Yael Farber 編劇和導演的戲劇 Nirbhaya，該劇旨在打破對性暴力的沉默。她的戲劇獲得了 2013 年“國際特赦獎”，並被《每日電訊報》稱為“你所見過的最有影響力的戲劇作品之一”。Jagannathan 在 10 年被 Femina 雜誌評為“印度最美麗的 50 位女性”前 2012 名，2014 年，她被評為印度最有權勢的 50 名女性之一。她最近是 Netflix 原創劇集《吉普賽人》的常客，也是 HBO 新選集劇集《104 號房間》的演員之一，該劇由 Duplass 兄弟執導。她的新片《Share》由 Pippa Bianco 執導，A24 製作，計劃於 2019 年在 HBO 上映。2018 年 5 月，Deadline 宣佈 Jagannathan 將加入 HBO 劇集《大小謊言》的演員陣容，作為一個新的反覆出現的角色。
data.name: 普爾娜·雅格娜森

data.overview: Thần Poseidon Của Tôi kể về nữ sinh tài năng của trường địa chất hải dương An Phi (Lý Khải Hinh), cô yêu thầm chuyên gia nghiên cứu trẻ tuổi Mạc Lãnh, luôn mơ ước một một ngày nào đó có thể sát cánh cùng anh trở thành cặp đôi ưu tú của viện nghiên cứu. Tuy nhiên khi giấc mơ còn chưa kịp thêu dệt thì thiếu niên đẹp trai Diệp Hải (Trương Vân Long) bất ngờ xuất hiện trong cuộc sống của cô. Anh không những mang đến xui xẻo, không chỉ làm xáo trộn mọi chuyện mà còn biến thành thần Poseidon (thần cai quản biển cả trong Thần thoại Hy Lạp), dõng dạc tuyên bố cô chính là Amphitrite - hoàng hậu biển cả của mình. Trải qua nhiều tình huống, cô phát hiện ký ức của mình thật sự có tình cảm sâu đậm với Diệp Hải. Hoá ra trong truyền thuyết hai người thật sự là Poseidon và Amphitrite, những vị thần có chức trách bảo vệ đại dương.

彭子晴（英语：Wailis Pang，1973年8月26日－），原名彭薆，前香港电视剧演员，从事保险行业。

彭子晴于1995年加入无线电视，与傅明宪、曹众、陈彦行、姚莹莹被TVB封为“五美图”。其代表作是长剧《真情》的阿静，2001年转投亚洲电视；2008年约满后便没有再续约，并且离开了娱乐圈。
data.name: 彭子晴

data.biography: Η Fatima Angelica Lontoc Cruz, γνωστή και με το τηλεοπτικό της όνομα Timmy Cruz, είναι μια Φιλιππινέζα τραγουδίστρια και ηθοποιός του κινηματογράφου.

Fatima Angelica Lontoc Cruz, also known by her screen name Timmy Cruz, is a Filipina singer and movie actress.

Cruz became popular in the 1980s for her songs "Boy", "Joke Lang" and "Tingin".

She also starred in films produced by Viva Films such as Kumander Bawang: Kalaban ng Mga Aswang (1988), Kung Kasalanan Man (1989), Pangarap Na Ginto (1990), Di Na Natuto (1993) and The Sarah Balabagan Story (1997). She played as the leading lady of Joey de Leon in Sheman: Mistress of the Universe, Eddie Garcia in Alfredo Lim: Batas ng Maynila and Fernando Poe Jr. in Batas ng .45.

She appeared in the GMA Network television series Villa Quintana (1995), Halik sa Apoy (1998), and Sinner or Saint (2011). She appeared also in ABS-CBN TV series Lobo (2008), Love Is Only in the Movies (2010), and Kapitan Inggo (2011).

Cruz has turned into a Gospel singer under Praise Music. Cruz was awarded the 2009 Fr. Neri Satur Environmental Heroism Award.

After a 9 year hiatus from her last project in GMA Network’s drama series Once Again, Cruz stars in the crime drama series, Widows’ War and portrays the role of Mercy Castillo. This is Cruz's comeback project.
data.name: Timmy Cruz

data.biography:
Atsushi Imaruoka (伊丸岡 篤, Imaruoka Atsushi, born May 23, 1972) is a Japanese voice actor from Isesaki City, Gunma Prefecture. He is affiliated with Mausu Promotion. He speaks the Joshu dialect. His hobbies and special skill is boxing.

In 2001, he entered the Mausu Promotion Actor Training School and in 2003 he joined the agency. Before becoming a voice actor, he was a professional boxer affiliated with Kyoei Boxing Gym. When he graduated from high school, he moved to Tokyo with the goal of becoming an actor. He then started going to a gym because he believed that an actor should also train his body. At first it was just to exercise, but later he became interested in getting a professional license. He debuted at the age of 24 and was active as a professional boxer for 3 years.
data.name: Atsushi Imaruoka

data.biography:
Atsushi Imaruoka (伊丸岡 篤, Imaruoka Atsushi, nacido el 23 de mayo de 1972) es un actor de doblaje (seiyuu) japonés de la ciudad de Isesaki, prefectura de Gunma. Pertenece a Mausu Promotion. Habla el dialecto Joshu. Su aficiones y habilitad especial es el boxeo.

En 2001 entró en la escuela de formación adscrita a Mausu Promotion y en 2003 se entró a formar parte de la agencia. Antes de convertirse en actor de doblaje, fue boxeador profesional afiliado al Kyoei Boxing Gym. Cuando se graduó de secundaria, se mudó a Tokio con el objetivo de convertirse en actor. Entonces, empezó a ir a un gimnasio pues creía que un actor debía entrenar también su cuerpo. Al principio solo era por hacer ejercicio, pero posteriormente se interesó por obtener una licencia profesional. Debutó a los 24 y estuvo activo como boxeador profesional durante 3 años.
data.name: Atsushi Imaruoka

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Stephanie Vanessa Fantauzzi (born March 17, 1987) is an American television and film actress, model and singer of Brazilian and Italian descent. Fantauzzi is best known for her role of Estefania in Showtime's Shameless.

Born in Sao Paulo, Brazil, but raised in Boca Raton, Florida, Fantauzzi is of Brazilian and Italian descent. She began her career as a model and singer, working in New York and Miami, and studied journalism and sociology while attending Florida Atlantic University in her late teens.While visiting Brazil with her father in 2009, Fantauzzi landed her first film role in Marcio Garcia's directorial debut, the award-winningPredi Fantauzzi went on to appear in numerous national commercials and television shows, including MTV’s Death Valley and Nickelodeon’s Big Time Rush.

In the fall of 2011, Fantauzzi began her recurring role as Estefania in Shameless, playing Jimmy's wife, the daughter of Brazilian drug lord Nando. On January 29, 2013, Showtime renewed Shameless for a fourth season.
data.name: Stephanie Fantauzzi

data.biography:
Stephanie Vanessa Fantauzzi (nacida el 17 de marzo de 1987) es una actriz de cine y televisión estadounidense, modelo y cantante de ascendencia brasileña e italiana. Fantauzzi es mejor conocida por su papel de Estefania en la serie de Showtime Shameless.

Nacida en Sao Paulo, Brasil, pero criada en Boca Raton, Florida, Fantauzzi es de ascendencia brasileña e italiana. Comenzó su carrera como modelo y cantante, trabajó en Nueva York y Miami, y estudió periodismo y sociología mientras asistía a la Florida Atlantic University en su adolescencia tardía. Mientras visitaba Brasil con su padre en 2009, Fantauzzi consiguió su primer papel cinematográfico en Marcio García. En su debut como director, el galardonado Predi Fantauzzi apareció en numerosos comerciales y programas de televisión nacionales, como Death Valley de MTV y Big Time Rush de Nickelodeon.

En el otoño de 2011, Fantauzzi comenzó su papel recurrente como Estefania en Shameless, interpretando a la esposa de Jimmy, la hija del narcotraficante brasileño Nando. El 29 de enero de 2013, Showtime renovó Shameless para una cuarta temporada.

data.name: Addison Timlin

data.biography:
Addison Jayne Timlin ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.  Addison Timlin wurde 1991 in Philadelphia im US-Bundesstaat Pennsylvania geboren. Im Alter von acht Jahren überredete sie ihre Eltern, sie zu einem Casting für das Musical Annie nach New York zu bringen. Sie erhielt die Rolle und war in den Folgejahren in verschiedenen Produktionen von Annie tätig. Anschließend erhielt sie eine Rolle in dem Broadway-Musical Gypsy. Um ihre Karriere zu fördern, zog ihre gesamte Familie mit ihr nach New York.

Im Alter von 14 erhielt sie ihre erste Filmrolle. Sie spielte in Entgleist die an Diabetes mellitus erkrankte Tochter von Clive Owen und Melissa George. 2006 spielte sie in der Fernsehserie 3 lbs., die aber bereits nach fünf ausgestrahlten Episoden eingestellt wurde. Zwei Jahre später erhielt sie eine Rolle in der Fernsehserie Cashmere Mafia. Der Sender ABC verlängerte die Serie aber nicht um eine zweite Staffel.

Ihren endgültigen Durchbruch feierte sie 2011 in der Rolle der jungen Schauspielerin Sasha Bingham in der vierten Staffel der Fernsehserie Californication. 2016 übernahm Sie in der Romanverfilmung Engelsnacht von Lauren Kate die weibliche Hauptrolle der Lucinda „Luce“ Price.

data.biography:
Christine Joan Taylor Stiller (born July 30, 1971) is a European-American actress. She is known for playing Marcia Brady in The Brady Bunch Movie and A Very Brady Sequel, as well as roles in films like The Craft, The Wedding Singer, Zoolander, Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story, and her television roles in Hey Dude, Arrested Development, and Search Party.

Taylor began her acting career in 1989 on the Nickelodeon children's television series Hey Dude where she played the lifeguard Melody Hanson. She continued in that role through 1991 while making various guest appearances on other programs. In 1995, Taylor was cast as Marcia Brady in The Brady Bunch Movie and later in A Very Brady Sequel.

Following The Brady Bunch Movie, Taylor made several comedic guest appearances on the TV series Ellen, landing the lead role in the television series Party Girl, based on the 1995 film of the same name, and more guest appearances on Seinfeld and Friends.

She played the racist school bully Laura Lizzie in the 1996 horror film The Craft, and also played Drew Barrymore's cousin, Holly Sullivan, in the 1998 comedy The Wedding Singer. In 2001, she starred alongside her husband Ben Stiller in Zoolander and again, in 2016, she reprised her role in Zoolander 2.

In 2005, she made television appearances as a guest star in two episodes of Arrested Development as Sally Sitwell and, in 2006, in an episode of NBC's My Name Is Earl. In July 2006, her husband, Ben Stiller announced plans to direct a CBS sitcom starring Taylor, but the series never aired. In 2008, she was in the film, Tropic Thunder, along with her husband, Ben Stiller.

She has appeared with Mandy Moore in both Dedication and License to Wed. In 2010, she guest starred in Hannah Montana Forever and she starred in the Hallmark Channel Christmas movie Farewell Mr. Kringle. In 2013, she reprised her role as Sally Sitwell in two episodes of the revived Arrested Development. She also guest starred on Elementary in 2017, playing villainess Gail Lundquist.

Beginning in 2016, Taylor had a recurring role as Gail on Search Party. In 2021, Taylor joined the cast of High Desert, an Apple TV+ series.

Christine and her husband, Ben Stiller, separated in 2017, after 17 years of marriage, but have since rekindled their marriage.
data.name: Christine Taylor

data.biography:
克里斯汀·琼·泰勒·斯蒂勒（Christine Joan Taylor Stiller，1971年7月30日-），美国女演员。她因在 The Brady Bunch Movie 和 A Very Brady Sequel 中扮演 Marcia Brady 以及在 The Craft、The Wedding Singer、Zoolander、Dodgeball： A True Underdog Story 等电影中的角色而闻名，以及她在 Hey Dude、Arrest Development 和 Search Party 中的电视角色。

泰勒于 1989 年在尼克国际儿童频道儿童电视连续剧《嘿，花花公子》中开始了她的演艺生涯，在那里她扮演救生员梅洛迪·汉森。直到1991年，她继续担任该职位，同时在其他节目中客串演出。1995 年，泰勒在《布雷迪邦奇电影》中饰演玛西娅·布雷迪，后来又在《非常布雷迪续集》中饰演玛西娅·布雷迪。

继《布雷迪邦奇电影》之后，泰勒在电视连续剧《艾伦》中客串了几次喜剧，在根据 1995 年同名电影改编的电视连续剧《派对女孩》中担任主角，并在《宋飞正传》和《老友记》中客串了更多角色。

她在 1996 年的恐怖电影《The Craft》中饰演种族主义校园恶霸 Laura Lizzie，还在 1998 年的喜剧《婚礼歌手》中饰演德鲁·巴里摩尔的表妹霍莉·沙利文。2001 年，她与丈夫本·斯蒂勒一起出演了《疯狂动物城》，2016 年，她再次在《疯狂动物城 2》中重新扮演了自己的角色。

2005 年，她作为客串明星出演了两集《发展受阻》，饰演莎莉·西特维尔，并于 2006 年客串了 NBC 的一集《我的名字是伯爵》。2006年7月，她的丈夫本·斯蒂勒（Ben Stiller）宣布计划执导一部由泰勒主演的CBS情景喜剧，但该剧从未播出。2008年，她与丈夫本·斯蒂勒（Ben Stiller）一起出演了电影《热带雷霆》。

她曾与曼迪·摩尔（Mandy Moore）一起出演《奉献》和《结婚许可》。2010年，她客串出演了《永远的汉娜·蒙大拿》，并出演了霍尔马克频道的圣诞电影《再见克林格尔先生》。2013 年，她在复活的两集中重新扮演莎莉·西特维尔 （Sally Sitwell） 的角色 被捕发展.她还在 2017 年客串出演了 Elementary，饰演反派 Gail Lundquist。

从 2016 年开始，泰勒在 Search Party 中反复扮演盖尔的角色。2021 年，泰勒加入了 Apple TV+ 剧集《High Desert》的演员阵容。

克里斯汀和她的丈夫本·斯蒂勒（Ben Stiller）在结婚17年后于2017年分居，但此后重新点燃了他们的婚姻。
data.name: 克里斯汀·泰勒

克里斯汀·瓊·泰勒·斯蒂勒（克里斯汀·泰勒，1971 年 7 月 30 日-），美國女演員。她因在 The Brady Bunch Movie 和 A Very Brady Sequel 中扮演 Marcia Brady 以及在 The Craft、The Wedding Singer、Zoolander、Dodgeball： A True Underdog Story 等電影中的角色而聞名，以及她在 Hey Dude、Arrest Development 和 Search Party 中的電視角色。

泰勒於 1989 年在尼克國際兒童頻道兒童電視聯續劇《嘿，花花公子》中開始了她的演藝生涯，在那裏她扮演救生員梅洛迪·漢森。直到 1991 年，她繼續擔任該職位，同時在其他節目中客串演出。1995 年，泰勒在《布雷迪邦奇電影》中飾演瑪西婭·布雷迪，後來又在《非常布雷迪續集》中飾演瑪西婭·布雷迪。

繼《布雷迪邦奇電影》之後，泰勒在電視聯續劇《艾倫》中客串了幾次喜劇，在根據 1995 年同名電影改編的電視聯續劇《舞吧！夜遊天使》中擔任主角，並在《宋飛正傳》和《老友記》中客串了更多角色。

她在 1996 年的恐怖電影《The Craft》中飾演種族主義校園惡霸 Laura Lizzie，還在 1998 年的喜劇《愛情嚟料》中飾演德魯·巴里摩爾的表妹霍莉·沙利文。2001 年，她與丈夫本·斯蒂勒一起出演了《優獸大都會》，2016 年，她再次在《瘋狂動物城 2》中重新扮演了自己的角色。

2005 年，她作為客串明星出演了兩集《發展受阻》，飾演莎莉·西特維爾，並於 2006 年客串了 NBC 的一集《我的名字是伯爵》。2006 年 7 月，她的丈夫本·斯蒂勒（Ben Stiller）宣佈計劃執導一部由泰勒主演的 CBS 情景喜劇，但該劇從未播出。2008 年，她與丈夫本·斯蒂勒（Ben Stiller）一起出演了電影《熱帶雷霆》。

她曾與曼迪·摩爾（Mandy Moore）一起出演《奉獻》和《結婚許可》。2010 年，她客串出演了《永遠的漢娜·蒙大拿》，並出演了霍爾馬克頻道的聖誕電影《再見克林格爾先生》。2013 年，她在復活的兩集中重新扮演莎莉·西特維爾 （Sally Sitwell） 的角色 被捕發展. 她還在 2017 年客串出演了 Elementary，飾演反派 Gail Lundquist。

從 2016 年開始，泰勒在 Search Party 中反覆扮演蓋爾的角色。2021 年，泰勒加入了 Apple TV+ 劇集《High Desert》的演員陣容。

克里斯汀和她的丈夫本·斯蒂勒（Ben Stiller）在結婚 17 年後於 2017 年分居，但此後重新點燃了他們的婚姻。
data.name: 克里斯汀·泰勒

data.biography: Freddy Rodriguez (born January 17, 1975 from two Puerto Rican parents) is an American actor known for playing the characters Hector Federico "Rico" Diaz on HBO's Six Feet Under and El Wray in Robert Rodriguez's Planet Terror. Recently, he was a recurring cast member on the series Ugly Betty as Giovanni "Gio" Rossi.
data.name: Freddy Rodríguez

data.biography: Freddy Rodriguez (nacido el 17 de enero de 1975 de dos padres puertorriqueños) es un actor estadounidense conocido por interpretar a los personajes Hector Federico "Rico" Díaz en Six Feet Under de HBO y El Wray en Planet Rodriguez Terror de Robert Rodriguez. Recientemente, fue un miembro del elenco recurrente en la serie Ugly Betty como Giovanni "Gio" Rossi.

W melodramacie "Spacer w chmurach" [1995] był wnukiem Anthony'ego Quinna, w dramacie sensacyjnym braci Allena i Alberta Hughesów "Martwi Prezydenci" [1995] wcielił się w postać Josego. Pojawił się u boku Johna Leguizamo w komedii "Szkodnik" [1997] oraz filmie akcji "Godzina zemsty" [1999] z Melem Gibsonem. Wystąpił także w telewizyjnym dramacie biograficznym HBO "Miłość lub ojczyzna. Historia Artura Sandovala" [2000] z Andy Garcią i Glorią Estefan. Niewysoki Freddy Rodríguez (1,68 cm wzrostu) jest z pochodzenia Puertorykańczykiem. Urodził się jednak w Chicago, w stanie Illinois - 17 stycznia 1975 roku. Swoją karierę aktorską rozpoczął w wieku czternastu lat w Lincoln Park High School w Chicago, gdzie zagrał w Whirlwind Performance Company w takich spektaklach teatralnych jak "Zabić Drozda" (To Kill a Mockingbird), "Dwunastu gniewnych ludzi", "Czarownice z Salem" (Twelve Angry Men", "The Crucible), "Sen nocy letniej" (A Midsummers Night's Dream) i "Loteria" (The Lottery). Otrzymał dwuletnie stypendium letniego programu artystycznego Centrum Chicago dla uzdolnionych osób i kontynuował swoją pracę, występując w ponad dwudziestu produkcjach teatralnych. Pomaga także przy tworzeniu szkolnych przedstawień teatralnych. Zachęca do podejmowania działań, rozmawiając z uczniami o radościach pracy w spektaklach i znaczeniu dążenia do spełniania marzeń.

data.biography:
Peter Henry Fonda (February 23, 1940 – August 16, 2019) was an American actor. He was the son of Henry Fonda, younger brother of Jane Fonda, and father of Bridget and Justin Fonda. Fonda was a part of the counterculture of the 1960s.

He was nominated for the Academy Award for Best Original Screenplay for Easy Rider (1969), and the Academy Award for Best Actor for Ulee's Gold (1997). For the latter, he won the Golden Globe Award for Best Actor – Motion Picture Drama. Fonda also won the Golden Globe Award for Best Supporting Actor – Series, Miniseries or Television Film for The Passion of Ayn Rand (1999).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Peter Fonda, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Peter Fonda

data.biography:
Peter Henry Fonda é um ator norte-americano. Peter é filho do ator Henry Fonda.

Possui ascendentes neerlandeses ("holandeses") do lado paterno, sendo filho de Henry Fonda, irmão de Jane Fonda e pai de Bridget Fonda (todos também atores), e de Justin Fonda. Desde 2011 é casado com Margaret 'Parky' DeVogelaere.

Ficou mundialmente famoso por sua atuação no filme Easy Rider (no Brasil, Sem Destino). Em 2007 interpretou Mefisto no filme do Motoqueiro Fantasma e emprestou sua voz ao personagem "The Truth" do jogo GTA San Andreas. Uma suposta frase dita por Peter após tomar ácido foi usada na letra da música "She Said, She Said" dos Beatles, "Eu sei como é estar morto".

Em 2000, Fonda foi incluído no Motorcycle Hall of Fame.

Peter Henry Fonda (23 février 1940 - 16 août 2019) était un acteur américain. C'est le fils de l'acteur Henry Fonda, le frère cadet de Jane Fonda et le père de Bridget Fonda. Il était une figure éminente de la contre-culture des années 1960. Peter a été nominé pour l'Oscar du meilleur scénario original pour Easy Rider (1969) et l'Oscar du meilleur acteur pour L'Or de la vie (1997). Pour ce dernier, il a remporté le Golden Globe Award du meilleur acteur dans un film dramatique. Peter a également remporté le Golden Globe Award du meilleur acteur dans un second rôle pour une série, mini-série ou téléfilm pour The Passion of Ayn Rand (1999).

Peter Fonda est né le 23 février 1940 à New York, fils unique de l'acteur Henry Fonda (1905–1982) et de sa femme Frances Ford Seymour (1908–1950); sa sœur aînée est l'actrice Jane Fonda (née en 1937). Lui et Jane avaient une demi-sœur, Frances de Villers Brokaw (1931–2008), issue du premier mariage de leur mère. Sa mère s'est suicidée dans un hôpital psychiatrique quand Peter avait 10 ans. Il n'a découvert les circonstances et le lieu de sa mort qu'à l'âge de 15 ans.

À son onzième anniversaire, il s'est accidentellement tiré une balle dans l'abdomen et a failli mourir. Il est allé à la station de montagne indienne de Nainital et y est resté quelques mois pour se rétablir. Des années plus tard, il a évoqué cet incident alors qu'il était avec John Lennon, George Harrison et Ringo Starr pendant qu'il prenait du LSD. Il a dit: «Je sais ce que c'est que d'être mort.» Cela a inspiré la chanson She Said She Said des Beatles.

Le jeune Peter a fréquenté la Fay School à Southborough, Massachusetts, et était membre de la classe de 1954. Il s'est ensuite inscrit à la Westminster School, un pensionnat du Connecticut à Simsbury, où il a obtenu son diplôme en 1958.

Une fois diplômé, il a étudié le théâtre à Omaha, Nebraska, la ville natale de son père. Alors qu'il fréquentait l'Université du Nebraska-Omaha, Peter a rejoint l'Omaha Community Playhouse, après avoir été recruté par la mère de Marlon Brando.

À son retour à New York, Peter rejoint le Cecilwood Theatre en 1960. Par la suite, il a trouvé du travail à Broadway et s'est fait remarquer dans Blood, Sweat and Stanley Poole, écrit par James et William Goldman, qui a duré 84 représentations en 1961. Il a commencé à jouer dans des émissions de télévision comme Naked City, The New Breed, Wagon Train et Les Défenseurs.

Le premier film de Peter lui est venu lorsque le producteur Ross Hunter cherchait un nouvel acteur masculin pour romancer Sandra Dee dans Tammy and the Doctor (1963), avec aussi Adam West dans le rôle du Dr. Eric Hassler, 3 ans avant que ce dernier ne se fasse connaitre pour son rôle principal dans la série télévisée Batman de 1966 à 1968, ainsi que le film éponyme sorti en 1966. Peter a été choisi pour le rôle du Dr. Mark Cheswick pour ce film qui connut un succès mineur. Il a suivi avec un rôle de soutien dans The Victors (1963), un regard sombre sur les soldats américains pendant la Seconde Guerre mondiale, réalisé par Carl Foreman. Sa performance lui a valu un Golden Globe Award du nouveau venu le plus prometteur. ...

Source: Article "Peter Fonda" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

彼得·亨利·方达（1940 年 2 月 23 日 - 2019 年 8 月 16 日）是美国演员。他是亨利·方达的儿子，简·方达的弟弟，布里奇特和贾斯汀·方达的父亲。方达是 1960 年代反主流文化的一部分。

他凭借《逍遥骑士》（1969 年）获得奥斯卡最佳原创剧本奖提名，并凭借《尤利的金奖》（1997 年）获得奥斯卡最佳男主角奖提名。对于后者，他获得了金球奖最佳男主角奖 - 电影剧情片。方达还凭借《安·兰德的激情》（1999 年）获得了金球奖最佳男配角奖——连续剧、迷你剧或电视电影。
data.name: 彼得·方达

彼得·亨利·方達（1940 年 2 月 23 日 - 2019 年 8 月 16 日）是美國演員。他是亨利·方達的兒子，簡·方達的弟弟，布里奇特和賈斯汀·方達的父親。方達是 1960 年代反主流文化的一部分。

他憑藉《逍遙騎士》（1969 年）獲得奧斯卡最佳原創劇本獎提名，並憑藉《尤利的金獎》（1997 年）獲得奧斯卡最佳男主角獎提名。對於後者，他獲得了金球獎最佳男主角獎 - 電影劇情片。方達還憑藉《安·蘭德的激情》（1999 年）獲得了金球獎最佳男配角獎——聯續劇、迷你劇或電視電影。
data.name: 彼得·方達

data.biography:
Ayako Omura (born December 19, 1984) is a Japanese actress, television personality, and model affiliated with Ito Company.

During the 1990s, Ayako Omura made a name for herself by appearing in various projects such as the TV drama "Yokai Newspaper" and the film "New Toilet's Hanako-san," where she acted alongside Yuko Nomura, Ai Maeda, and Maya Hamaoka. Together, they became known as the "Four Heavenly Kings of Chaidoru" and even formed a group called "Pretty Chat," which also released music.

After graduating from Horikoshi High School and later from Seijo University, Ayako Omura decided to pursue a serious acting career. She recalls that her dedication to acting truly began with the drama "The Ugly Duckling," where she received advice from the director to perform the kind of acting she truly wanted to do. This experience led her to actively engage with acting and earn praise from the director, ultimately sparking her realization that "acting is fascinating."

In addition, she shared a close friendship with Yuka Nomura, her fellow "Chaidoru" member, and they were classmates at university. They both participated in a club called the "European Culture Study Group," where they presented research on interior design and European films.
data.name: Ayako Omura

data.biography:
Patrick Lindesay Archibald Godfrey (born 13 February 1933) is an English actor of film, television and stage. Godfrey was born in Finsbury, London to Rev. Frederick Godfrey and Lois Mary Gladys (née Turner).

In 1956 Godfrey joined the Radio Drama Company by winning the Carleton Hobbs Bursary. He made his film debut in Miss Julie (1972), and appeared in several British films of the 1980s, 1990s and 2000s, including A Room with a View, The Remains of the Day, The Importance of Being Earnest, The Count of Monte Cristo, Dimensions and Les Misérables. He also played Leonardo da Vinci in the Cinderella adaptation Ever After alongside Drew Barrymore and Dougray Scott. He had many roles on television, appearing in Doctor Who, Inspector Morse, and other series.
data.name: Patrick Godfrey

data.biography:
Paul Edward Winfield (born May 22, 1939) was an American actor.

He was known for his portrayal of a Louisiana sharecropper who struggles to support his family during the Great Depression in the landmark film Sounder which earned him an Academy Award nomination. Winfield also portrayed Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. in the television miniseries King, for which he was nominated for an Emmy Award.

data.overview: Bộ phim Nước Mỹ một thời với chủ đề hết sức đa dạng từ tình bạn, tình yêu, tình dục, lòng tham, sự phản bội, sự mất mát. Phim chia thành 3 giai đoạn trong lịch sử nước Mỹ: những năm đầu thập niên 20, khoảng năm 1933 và năm 1968. Nhân vật chính trong phim là Noodles một đứa trẻ đường phố ở New York chuyên đi móc túi, cướp giật. Noodles thầm yêu Deborah và thường nhìn trộm Deborah tập múa, Deborah vừa yêu vừa sợ Noodles nên chuyện tình khá thú vị. Tuy nhiên sau lệnh cấm rượu của nước Mỹ, băng nhóm của Noodles đã tham gia kinh doanh bất hợp pháp món hàng này và đụng độ với một băng nhóm khác dẫn đến cái chết của 1 thành viên. Bộ phim với nhiều cảnh bạo lực nhưng phản ánh vô cùng chân thực nước Mỹ thời kỳ này.
data.title: Nước Mỹ Một Thời

data.biography:
Danny Lloyd (born October 13, 1972) is an American former child actor.

Lloyd's first and best-known role is that of Danny Torrance in Stanley Kubrick's The Shining, starring Jack Nicholson and Shelley Duvall. He was selected for the role due to his ability to maintain his concentration for extended periods of time.
data.name: Danny Lloyd

data.biography:
丹尼·劳埃德（Danny Lloyd，1973年1月1日-），美国前童星。

劳埃德的第一个也是最著名的角色是斯坦利·库布里克的《闪灵》中的丹尼·托伦斯，由杰克·尼科尔森和雪莱·杜瓦尔主演。

他之所以被选中担任这个角色，是因为他能够长时间保持注意力集中。在加勒特·布朗（Garrett Brown）和约翰·巴克斯特（John Baxter）的DVD评论中，他们指出库布里克能够拍摄劳埃德的所有场景，而这位六岁的演员却没有意识到自己在一部恐怖电影中。

劳埃德还在薇薇安·库布里克拍摄的《闪灵》（1980）中接受了采访。尽管他在《闪灵》中表现出色，但除了在 1982 年的电视电影《威尔：G. 戈登·利迪自传》中饰演“年轻的利迪”外，后来几乎没有听到或看到劳埃德。劳埃德从演艺圈退休，成为了一名科学老师。2007年，劳埃德成为肯塔基州伊丽莎白镇一所社区学院的生物学教授，同年12月，他成为密苏里州的一名科学教师。
data.name: 丹尼·劳埃德

data.biography:
丹尼·勞埃德（Danny Lloyd，1973 年 1 月 1 日-），美國前童星。

勞埃德的第一個也是最著名的角色是斯坦利·庫布里克的《閃靈》中的丹尼·托倫斯，由傑克·尼科爾森和雪萊·杜瓦爾主演。

他之所以被選中擔任這個角色，是因為他能夠長時間保持注意力集中。在加勒特·布朗（Garrett Brown）和約翰·巴克斯特（John Baxter）的 DVD 評論中，他們指出庫布里克能夠拍攝勞埃德的所有場景，而這位六歲的演員卻沒有意識到自己在一部恐怖電影中。

勞埃德還在薇薇安·庫布里克拍攝的《閃靈》（1980）中接受了採訪。盡管他在《閃靈》中表現出色，但除了在 1982 年的電視電影《威爾：G. 戈登·利迪自傳》中飾演“年輕的利迪”外，後來幾乎沒有聽到或看到勞埃德。勞埃德從演藝圈退休，成為了一名科學老師。2007 年，勞埃德成為肯塔基州伊麗莎白鎮一所社區學院的生物學教授，同年 12 月，他成為密蘇裏州的一名科學教師。
data.name: 丹尼·勞埃德

data.biography:
Glenda May Jackson CBE (9 May 1936, Birkenhead, Cheshire – 15 June 2023) was an English actress and politician. She was one of the few artists to achieve the Triple Crown of Acting, having won two Academy Awards, three Emmy Awards and a Tony Award. She was made a CBE by Queen Elizabeth II in 1978.

She won the Academy Award for Best Actress twice: for her roles in Women in Love (1970) and A Touch of Class (1973). She won the BAFTA Award for Best Actress in a Leading Role for Sunday Bloody Sunday (1971). Her other notable roles include Mary, Queen of Scots (1971), Hedda (1975), The Incredible Sarah (1976) and Hopscotch (1980). She won two Primetime Emmy Awards for her role as Elizabeth I in the BBC series Elizabeth R (1971). She received the British Academy Television Award for Best Actress for her role in Elizabeth Is Missing (2019).

Jackson studied at the Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA). She made her Broadway debut in Marat/Sade (1966). She received five Laurence Olivier Award nominations for her West End roles in Stevie (1977), Antony and Cleopatra (1979), Rose (1980), Strange Interlude (1984) and King Lear (2016), the later being her first role after a 25 year absence from acting, which she reprised on Broadway in 2019. She won the Tony Award for Best Actress in a Play for her role in the revival of Edward Albee's Three Tall Women (2018).

Jackson took a hiatus from acting to take on a career in politics from 1992 to 2015, and was elected as the Labour Party MP for Hampstead and Highgate in the 1992 general election. She served as a junior transport minister from 1997 to 1999 during the government of Tony Blair, later becoming critical of Blair. After constituency boundary changes, she represented Hampstead and Kilburn from 2010. At the 2010 general election, her majority of 42 votes, confirmed after a recount, was the narrowest of that parliament. Jackson stood down at the 2015 general election and returned to acting.
data.name: Glenda Jackson

data.biography:
Glenda May Jackson est une actrice et femme politique britannique née le 9 mai 1936, à Birkenhead. Deux fois lauréate de l'Oscar de la meilleure actrice, elle est faite commandeur de l'ordre de l'Empire britannique en 1978.

Jackson est née à Birkenhead, The Wirral, dans le Cheshire, au sein d'une famille ouvrière. Elle se destine d'abord à un emploi de préparatrice en pharmacie.

Elle a un fils de son ex-mari, Roy Hodges, qu'elle a épousé à 22 ans.

À 16 ans, elle quitte l'école pour rejoindre une troupe de comédiens amateurs. Deux ans plus tard, elle intègre la Royal Academy of Dramatic Art. Après l'obtention de son diplôme d'art dramatique, elle commence à travailler dans le théâtre de répertoire comme actrice et aussi comme régisseur. Elle fait ses débuts sur scène en 1957 dans Tables séparés (Separate Tables) de Terence Rattigan mais est véritablement découverte par Peter Brook qui la met en scène dans son cycle de spectacles liés au théâtre de la cruauté. En 1964, elle triomphe dans le rôle de Charlotte Corday grâce à la pièce de Peter Weiss, Marat/Sade. Elle fait ses premiers pas au cinéma dans Le Prix d'un homme (This Sporting Life) de Lindsay Anderson et retrouve Brook sur deux réalisations: Marat-Sade où elle reprend le rôle de Charlotte Corday et Tell Me Lies.

Devenue une actrice de théâtre très réputée outre-Manche, elle accède à la célébrité internationale grâce à deux rôles dans des films de Ken Russell: celui de Gudrun Brangwen, l'artiste-sculptrice émancipée, se partageant entre Oliver Reed et Alan Bates, dans Love (Women in Love, adapté du roman de D.H Lawrence) qui lui vaut son premier Oscar en 1971, et celui d'Antonina Milyukova, l'épouse nymphomane du compositeur homosexuel Piotr Ilitch Tchaïkovski, joué par Richard Chamberlain dans La Symphonie pathétique (The Music Lovers, 1971). Elle travaille ensuite avec John Schlesinger sur Un dimanche comme les autres (Sunday Bloody Sunday) où elle partage son amant, interprété par Murray Head, avec Peter Finch. Elle est aussi dirigée par Joseph Losey dans Une Anglaise romantique (The Romantic Englishwoman) où, mariée avec Michael Caine, elle s'offre un gigolo interprété par Helmut Berger. Elle collabore par ailleurs avec Robert Altman à deux reprises: dans Health, elle a notamment pour partenaire Lauren Bacall et donne ensuite la réplique, dans Beyond Therapy, à Jeff Goldblum et Julie Hagerty. Glenda Jackson s'est par ailleurs confrontée à Vanessa Redgrave dans Marie Stuart, Reine d'Écosse (Mary, Queen of Scots), sortant victorieuse de l'affrontement, aussi marquante dans le rôle de la reine vierge que Bette Davis en son temps. Elle a aussi fait face à Susannah York dans l'adaptation filmée par Christopher Miles (frère de l'actrice Sarah Miles) de la pièce de Jean Genet Les Bonnes.

Au début des années 1970, Glenda Jackson apparaît dans quelques sketches de l'émission de Morecambe and Wise pour la BBC montrant ainsi son envie de s'illustrer dans le registre comique. Au cinéma, elle confirme son passage à la comédie avec Une maîtresse dans les bras, une femme sur le dos (A Touch of class, 1973) de Melvin Frank; film pour lequel elle remporte un deuxième Oscar. ...

Source: Article "Glenda Jackson" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

Glenda May Jackson CBE (Birkenhead, 9 maggio 1936 – Londra, 15 giugno 2023) è stata un'attrice e politica inglese. È stata una delle poche artiste a raggiungere la Triple Crown of Acting, avendo vinto due Academy Awards, tre Emmy Awards e un Tony Award. È stata nominata CBE dalla regina Elisabetta II nel 1978.

Ha vinto due volte l'Oscar come migliore attrice: per i suoi ruoli in Women in Love (1970) e Un tocco di classe (1973). Ha vinto il BAFTA Award come migliore attrice protagonista per Sunday Bloody Sunday (1971). Tra gli altri suoi ruoli degni di nota ricordiamo Mary, Queen of Scots (1971), Hedda (1975), The Incredible Sarah (1976) e Hopscotch (1980). Ha vinto due Primetime Emmy Awards per il suo ruolo di Elisabetta I nella serie della BBC Elizabeth R (1971). Ha ricevuto il British Academy Television Award come migliore attrice per il suo ruolo in Elizabeth Is Missing (2019).

Jackson ha studiato alla Royal Academy of Dramatic Art (RADA). Ha fatto il suo debutto a Broadway in Marat/Sade (1966). Ha ricevuto cinque nomination ai Laurence Olivier Award per i suoi ruoli nel West End in Stevie (1977), Antonio e Cleopatra (1979), Rose (1980), Strange Interlude (1984) e King Lear (2016), quest'ultimo è il suo primo ruolo dopo un'assenza di 25 anni dalla recitazione, che ha ripreso a Broadway nel 2019. Ha vinto il Tony Award come migliore attrice in un'opera teatrale per il suo ruolo nel revival di Three Tall Women (2018) di Edward Albee.

Jackson si è preso una pausa dalla recitazione per intraprendere una carriera in politica dal 1992 al 2015, ed è stato eletto deputato del Partito Laburista per Hampstead e Highgate nelle elezioni generali del 1992. Ha servito come ministro dei trasporti dal 1997 al 1999 durante il governo di Tony Blair, diventando in seguito critica nei confronti di Blair. Dopo i cambiamenti dei confini della circoscrizione, ha rappresentato Hampstead e Kilburn dal 2010. Alle elezioni generali del 2010, la sua maggioranza di 42 voti, confermata dopo un riconteggio, è stata la più risicata di quel parlamento. Jackson si è dimesso alle elezioni generali del 2015 ed è tornato ad agire.

data.biography:
William Jack Poulter (born 28 January 1993) is an English actor. He first gained recognition in School of Comedy (2009) and then for his role as Eustace Scrubb in the adventure film The Chronicles of Narnia: The Voyage of the Dawn Treader (2010) and his starring role in the comedy film We're the Millers (2013). He won the BAFTA Rising Star Award in 2014.

Poulter starred in the first and third films of the dystopian science fiction trilogy The Maze Runner (2014–2018), the period film The Revenant (2015), the drama film Detroit (2017), the interactive film Black Mirror: Bandersnatch (2018), and the horror film Midsommar (2019). In 2021, he was featured in the Hulu miniseries Dopesick, for which he received a Primetime Emmy Award nomination for Outstanding Supporting Actor. In 2023, he joined the Marvel Cinematic Universe as Adam Warlock in Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3. He had a recurring role in FX's series The Bear, which earned him another Emmy Award nomination.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Will Poulter, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

data.biography: William Jack Poulter (28 de noviembre de 1993) es un actor inglés.​ Ha trabajado, entre otras películas, en Las crónicas de Narnia: la travesía del Viajero del Alba, We're the Millers, The Maze Runner y El renacido.

William Jack (Will) Poulter (ur. 28 stycznia 1993 w Londynie) – angielski aktor filmowy i telewizyjny.

Kształcił się w The Harrodian School. Debiutował w 2007 jedną z głównym ról w filmie familijnym Syn Rambow. W 2010 wcielił się w postać Eustachego Scrubba w kinowej adaptacji powieści Podróż „Wędrowca do Świtu”. W 2013 zagrał Kenny’ego Rossmore’a w Millerach, występując u boku Jennifer Aniston i Jasona Sudeikisa. Rola przyniosła mu m.in. nominację do MTV Movie Award w trzech kategoriach (i wygraną w dwóch z nich), a także przyznawaną przez publiczność Nagrodę Brytyjskiej Akademii Filmowej dla najlepszej wschodzącej gwiazdy.

威尔·保尔特银幕处女作是《开拍吧！第二滴血》，饰演学校恶霸，基于对电影的喜爱，竟与乖乖牌同学建立想不到的情谊。该片在2007年日舞影展首映，获得热烈好评，最后更受邀到多伦多影展、纽艾普特海滩影展、西雅图影展、格拉斯哥影展与第51届英国电影学院伦敦影展。该片后来荣获英国《帝国》杂志电影奖最佳喜剧片奖与瑞士洛迦诺影展的观众票选奖；也获得英国影艺学院最佳编剧与导演奖、4座英国独立电影奖提名，威尔另外提名最具潜力新人奖。他在伦敦土生土长，4岁在当地学校话剧演出精灵一角，开启对表演的热情。这些年来，他持续在未曾接受正式戏剧课程情况下参与学校话剧演出。他在就读的Harrodian中学，被选角指导苏西费吉斯(Susie Figgis)发掘，该校有活跃的戏剧系，一直是当地电影/电视工业寻找演艺新星的重镇。他与其他来自Harrodian中学的年轻喜剧演员都是Channel 4频道2008年8月播出的《Comedy Lab》系列节目首集试播片《School of Comedy》的一员。Channel 4年后来正式批准制播，完整系列节目于2009年秋天播出。"
data.name: 威尔·保尔特

data.biography: 威爾·保爾特銀幕處女作是《開拍吧！第二滴血》，飾演學校惡霸，基於對電影的喜愛，竟與乖乖牌同學建立想不到的情誼。該片在 2007 年日舞影展首映，獲得熱烈好評，最後更受邀到多倫多影展、紐艾普特海灘影展、西雅圖影展、格拉斯哥影展與第 51 屆英國電影學院倫敦影展。該片後來榮獲英國《帝國》雜誌電影獎最佳喜劇片獎與瑞士洛迦諾影展的觀眾票選獎；也獲得英國影藝學院最佳編劇與導演獎、4 座英國獨立電影獎提名，威爾另外提名最具潛力新人獎。他在倫敦土生土長，4 歲在當地學校話劇演出精靈一角，開啟對錶演的熱情。這些年來，他持續在未曾接受正式戲劇課程情況下參與學校話劇演出。他在就讀的 Harrodian 中學，被選角指導蘇西費吉斯 (Susie Figgis) 發掘，該校有活躍的戲劇系，一直是當地電影/電視工業尋找演藝新星的重鎮。他與其他來自 Harrodian 中學的年輕喜劇演員都是 Channel 4 頻道 2008 年 8 月播出的《Comedy Lab》系列節目首集試播片《School of Comedy》的一員。Channel 4 年後來正式批準製播，完整系列節目於 2009 年秋天播出。"

data.biography: Ирина Горбачёва родилась в городе Мариуполь, Донецкая область, Украинская ССР, СССР. В детстве занималась вокалом и хореографией. В 2006-2010 годы училась в Театральном институте имени Бориса Щукина, курс Родиона Юрьевича Овчинникова. Во время учёбы Ирина была задействована в спектаклях Театра Вахтангова. После окончания обучения участвовала в стажёрской труппе Мастерской Петра Фоменко и в студии Олега Табакова в качестве приглашённой актрисы в постановке «Фантазии Фарятьева». В 2008 году впервые снялась в кино в в небольшой роли в дебютном фильме режиссёра Романа Прыгунова «Индиго». В 2010 году за роль в фильме Веры Сторожевой «Компенсация» была награждена премией за лучшую женскую роль на I-м Забайкальском кинофестивале. Принимала участие в документальном фильме про театр Петра Фоменко, снятом для телеканала «Россия-Культура». В апреле 2016 года номинирована на престижную российскую премию «Золотая маска» в номинации «Лучшая женская роль» за спектакль «Сон в летнюю ночь». В 2016 году получила премию «Женщина года 2016» по версии журнала «GQ». 5 декабря 2016 года Ирина Горбачёва получила «Звезду Театрала» номинации «Лучшая женская роль второго плана» за роль Елены в спектакле «Сон в летнюю ночь», поставленном Иваном Поповски «Мастерской Петра Фоменко». Также известна благодаря коротким видеороликам в сети Instagram, где её скетчи-гэги и мгновенные импровизации привлекли 1,7 миллиона подписчиков. Создала танцевальный проект «Я танцую по Москве», направленный на обретение внутренней свободы благодаря танцам на улицах и в парках города, помогающий людям стать более открытыми, активными и уверенными в себе. «Что для меня главное в проекте... Наверное, отключить этот постоянно работающий мозг, эту коробку с представлением о нас, какими мы по сути не являемся, да и в глубине души не хотим быть! Почти каждый человек хочет танцевать там, где ему захотелось, встречать в ответ улыбку, да что уж там... как редко мы стали держать друг друга в объятьях, жать крепко руку, махать встречным людям, да и просто валять дурака... Проект это не только танцы, а скорее даже „танцевальная терапия“»
data.name: Ирина Горбачёва

data.biography:
Jack Lang, né le 2 septembre 1939 à Mirecourt (Vosges), est un juriste et homme politique français.

Membre du Parti socialiste, il est notamment conseiller de Paris dans les années 1980, maire de Blois de 1989 à 2000 et député (de Loir-et-Cher puis du Pas-de-Calais) entre 1986 et 2012. Il est battu lors des élections législatives de 2012 dans les Vosges.

Sous les présidences de François Mitterrand et Jacques Chirac, il est plusieurs fois ministre dans des gouvernements de gauche, détenant plusieurs fois les portefeuilles de la Culture et de l’Éducation nationale, ainsi que le porte-parolat du gouvernement. Il participe notamment au lancement de la Fête de la musique.

En 2013, il est nommé président de l'Institut du monde arabe.

Jack Mathieu Émile Lang, né le 2 septembre 1939 à Mirecourt dans les Vosges, est issu d'une riche famille juive athée de Nancy; son père, Roger Lang (1902-1955), est le directeur commercial de l'entreprise familiale fondée et dirigée par le grand-père de Jack, Albert Lang (1874-1964), qui avait fait fortune à la fin de la Première Guerre mondiale, à la tête de cette entreprise de récupération et de traitement des déchets industriels. Roger et Albert sont tous deux francs-maçons. La mère de Jack, Marie-Luce Bouchet, dont les grands-parents étaient catholiques, est née en 1919 et décédée en 2003, et était la fille d'Émile Bouchet, instituteur athée et franc-maçon, mort en 1926, et de Berthe Boulanger, infirmière, également franc-maçonne et née dans une famille de conviction monarchiste.

Dès 1938, en raison du risque de guerre avec l'Allemagne, Albert et Roger avaient envoyé leurs épouses à Vichy. Après l'invasion allemande, Albert Lang et sa femme s'installent à Brive-la-Gaillarde, en Corrèze. Le jeune Jack et sa mère partent pour Cholet chez son arrière-grand-mère, la mère de Berthe Boulanger, puis à Bordeaux, alors que son père Roger est tout d'abord mobilisé à Lunéville, puis rejoint ses parents et son beau-frère Luc Bouchet à Brive-la-Gaillarde. Jack et sa mère rejoignent également Brive-la-Gaillarde après le bombardement de Bordeaux.

Son père est condamné par le tribunal de Brive-la-Gaillarde pour non-déclaration de ses enfants comme juifs, avant d'être relaxé par la Cour d'appel de Limoges du fait que la mère des enfants est catholique. Roger Lang soutient, sur l'avis du rabbin de Brive-la-Gaillarde, David Feuerwerker, que seule la filiation maternelle détermine l'adhésion à la religion juive. Roger Lang est cependant placé en résidence surveillée. Berthe Bouchet vient voir la famille Lang en avril 1942 alors que sa fille est sur le point d'accoucher de son troisième enfant, Marianne. Berthe, vénérable de la première loge maçonnique mixte, est arrêtée par la Gestapo à la suite d'une dénonciation en 1943 à Nancy. Condamnée pour faits de propagande et de résistance, elle est déportée à Ravensbrück, où elle est gazée le 30 mars 1945. ...

Jack Mathieu Émile Lang (born 2 September 1939) is a French politician. A member of the Socialist Party, he served as Minister of Culture from 1981 to 1986 and again from 1988 to 1993, as well as Minister of National Education from 1992 to 1993 and 2000 to 2002.

He was also Mayor of Blois from 1989 until his resignation in 2000. Lang is best known for originating the Fête de la Musique in 1982 as Culture Minister, an all day public music festival which occurs yearly on 21 June in France and throughout the world. Since 2013 he has been president of the Arab World Institute in Paris.

Jack Lang was born to Roger Lang and Marie-Luce Bouchet in Mirecourt, in the département of Vosges. His father's family were a secular, assimilated, well-to-do Jewish family based in Nancy. Roger Lang was the commercial manager of the family business which was founded by Jack's grandfather Albert. Roger and Albert were both freemasons. Jack's mother, Marie-Luce Bouchet, a Catholic, was born in 1919 as the daughter of Emile Bouchet, who died in 1926, and Berthe Boulanger, a nurse who was also a freemason.

In 1938, Albert and Roger sent their wives to Vichy because of the threat of war with Germany. After the German invasion, Albert Lang and his wife moved to Brive-la-Gaillarde in Corrèze. The very young Jack and his mother went to stay with his great grandmother (the mother of Berthe Boulanger) in Cholet and subsequently moved to Bordeaux. His father Roger was first mobilized in Luneville, and then joined his parents and his brother-in-law Luc Bouchet in Brive. Jack and his mother also joined them in Brive after the bombing of Bordeaux. Jack Lang's father was sentenced by the court in Brive for failure to report his children as Jews, but was later acquitted by the Court of Appeal on the ground that the children's mother was a Catholic. He had followed the advice of the rabbi of Brive, David Feuerwerker. Roger Lang was nevertheless placed under house arrest. Berthe Bouchet (Boulanger) visited the Langs in April 1942 when her daughter was about to give birth to her third child, Marianne. In 1943, Berthe was arrested in Nancy by the Gestapo for acts of propaganda and resistance. She was deported to Ravensbrück and died in the spring of 1945.

Jack Lang studied political science at the Institut d'Études Politiques de Paris, and went on to receive a postgraduate degree in public law. His career then focused on a combination of teaching and culture and the arts. He was the founder and producer of Festival du Monde in Nancy, was director of the Nancy University Theatre from 1963 to 1972, and then director of the Théâtre national de Chaillot from 1972 to 1974. At the same time he was a professor of international law from 1971 to 1981 at Nancy University and then Paris Nanterre University. He married Monique Buczynski in 1961. The couple have two daughters.

In 1997, he was President of Jury to the 47th Berlin International Film Festival.

Lang entered politics as a Socialist member of the French National Assembly from Paris in 1977. He is best known for having served as Minister of Culture (22 May 1981 – 19 March 1986 and 13 May 1988 – 29 March 1993) and as Minister of Education (3 April 1992 – 29 March 1993 and 27 March 2000 – 5 May 2002). ...

data.biography: Actor y cantante bajo la firma GMMTV.  Estudio en la escuela Boonvat Wittayalai de la provincia de Lampang. Al terminar la secundaria decidio estudiar la carrera de medicina veterinaria en la Universidad Chulalongkorn.  También es miembro de la boy band Cute Chef Thailand.

Mix Sahaphap Wongratch is an actor born and raised in Lampang Province. He is currently a fifth-year student at Chulalongkorn University in the Faculty of Veterinary Science.

Sahaphap entered the entertainment industry when he participated in the parade of the Chula-Thammasat Traditional Football Match, summoning the university flag during the parade. He is also a former member of the boy band Cute Chef, however, they disbanded at the end of 2018.

Mix signed with GMMTV in 2019 before starring in their series "1000 Stars" which was released in 2021 after some delays.

data.biography:
Sahaphap Wongratch, mais conhecido como Mix, é um ator e cantor tailandês agenciado pela GMMTV. Natural da província de Lampang, Mix possui uma trajetória acadêmica de destaque, sendo graduado em Medicina Veterinária pela prestigiada Universidade Chulalongkorn.

Sua entrada na indústria do entretenimento aconteceu de forma marcante ao participar como um dos carregadores da bandeira da universidade no tradicional jogo de futebol Chula-Thammasat. Antes de focar na atuação, foi membro do grupo de boy band Cute Chef, que se dissolveu em 2018. Mix assinou com a GMMTV em 2019 e estreou como protagonista no sucesso mundial "A Tale of Thousand Stars" (2021) interpretando Tian. Sua química com Earth Pirapat consolidou o "ship" EarthMix, levando-os a protagonizar diversos projetos aclamados como "Moonlight Chicken" (2023) e a versão tailandesa de "Ossan's Love".
data.name: Mix Sahaphap Wongratch

data.biography:
Роман Володимирович Ясіновський — український актор театру та кіно. З 2004 року працював у Центрі Сучасного Мистецтва «ДАХ». Грає у київському театрі «Золоті Ворота».

У 2003 році закінчив Тернопільське музичне училище (спеціальність — вокаліст, диригент хору). У 2007-му — Київський національний Університет театру, кіно і телебачення ім. І. К. Карпенка-Карого (спеціальність — актор театру і кіно, курс Л. С. Танюка).

Виховує доньку. Із п'яти років співав у хорі «Зоринка». Також з дитинства співає у церкві. Раніше мав дискант, тепер — бас. Зараз є учасником церковного хору греко-католицької церкви в монастирі св. Василія Великого, який розташовано на Вознесенському узвозі в Києві.

Улюблений актор — Гері Олдмен. Займається боксом.
data.name: Роман Ясіновський

data.biography:
Stucker was born in Des Moines, Iowa. His family moved to Shaker Heights, Ohio, where he distinguished himself in school as a pianist and class clown. He graduated from high school in 1965. Stucker made his screen debut co-starring in the 1975 comedic sexploitation film Carnal Madness as Bruce Wilson, a gay fashion designer who escapes from an insane asylum with two fellow inmates, fleeing to an all-girls school. He went on to perform in the 1977 earthquake-in-Los-Angeles comedy Cracking Up, alongside Fred Willard, Michael McKean, and Harry Shearer. In 1977 he appeared in the John Landis film The Kentucky Fried Movie, based on the troupe's sketches. This led to his supporting role in the Zucker-Abrahams-Zucker comedy Airplane!, which he reprised in Airplane II: The Sequel. For the initial film, the writers gave Stucker the straight lines for his scenes and let him write his character's off-the-wall responses. In 1982 he had a guest role in a three-episode sequence in the TV series Mork & Mindy and, in 1983, had a small featured role in Landis' Trading Places. In 1984, he had a co-starring role as the sex-obsessed psychiatrist, Dr. Bender, in the teen comedy film Bad Manners (aka: Growing Pains).

On July 12, 1984, Stucker was diagnosed with AIDS. He later publicly announced his illness, making him one of the first actors to announce he was suffering from the disease. Stucker had apparently suffered from many different types of cancer-related symptoms as early as 1979, prior to public knowledge of what AIDS was. He died from AIDS-related complications on April 13, 1986 at the age of 38. He is interred in the Chapel of the Chimes.
